MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgement, Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Feb-18-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Arthur Lipton, Esq. 415-658-7873 Lipton Law Office for Plaintiff.
Michael Leahy, Esq. 415-766-3200 Hawkins Parnell for Defendant.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs GROCERY OUTLET INC.,and SUB EK INC.'s Motion For Summary Judgement, Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication.

Defendants Grocery Outlet and Sub EK's motion for summary judgment and alternate motion for summary adjudication are denied in their entirety. Defendants failed to satisfy their initial motion burden of showing by admissible evidence that plaintiff Shawn Scott cannot prove his negligence and battery claims or his request for punitive damages. Even if defendants did satisfy their burden on any of these matters, paragraphs 4, 6-11 and 13 of the declaration of Mr. Scott shows that there are triable factual disputes as to both of Mr. Scott's claims and his request for punitive damages.

Order is signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)
